task_completion.description: Create the study phase conditions file (drm_study_words.csv)
task_completion.visual_evidence: A spreadsheet or text editor showing 'drm_study_words.csv' with columns 'word', 'listNum', and 'listName', containing the 36 specified words (excluding the critical lures 'sleep', 'needle', 'sweet').

task_completion.description: Create the test phase conditions file (drm_test_words.csv)
task_completion.visual_evidence: A spreadsheet or text editor showing 'drm_test_words.csv' with columns 'word', 'itemType', 'correctAns', and 'listNum', containing 21 words with correctAns values of 'o' for targets and 'n' for lures/foils.

task_completion.description: Set up the PsychoPy experiment flow with required routines
task_completion.visual_evidence: The PsychoPy Builder 'Flow' panel at the bottom showing routines for instructions, a study phase, a distractor, and a test phase.

task_completion.description: Configure the study phase routine and loop
task_completion.visual_evidence: PsychoPy properties showing a text component with a duration of 2.0s and text set to a variable (e.g., $word), and a loop surrounding the study routine that loads 'drm_study_words.csv'.

task_completion.description: Configure the test phase routine and loop
task_completion.visual_evidence: PsychoPy properties showing a keyboard response component with allowed keys 'o' and 'n' (and optionally storing correct answers), and a loop surrounding the test routine that loads 'drm_test_words.csv'.

task_completion.description: Save the experiment to the correct path
task_completion.visual_evidence: The PsychoPy window title bar or a save dialog showing the file named 'drm_false_memory.psyexp' located in the '/home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/' directory.

integrity.description: Agent used the PsychoPy Builder GUI to create the experiment
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the PsychoPy Builder interface (adding routines, configuring components), rather than writing a .psyexp XML file directly in a text editor or using terminal commands.

integrity.description: Agent used a text editor or spreadsheet application to create the CSV files
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a spreadsheet program (like LibreOffice Calc) or a text editor being used to input the word lists, rather than just echoing text via terminal commands.

integrity.description: Agent created the files from scratch
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen typing or pasting the words into the CSVs and building the PsychoPy experiment step-by-step, rather than just running a script that generates the entire experiment instantly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The experiment must be saved to /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/drm_false_memory.psyexp. The study conditions file (/home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/conditions/drm_study_words.csv) must contain exactly 36 words across 3 lists, strictly excluding the critical lures 'sleep', 'needle', and 'sweet'. The test conditions file (/home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/conditions/drm_test_words.csv) must contain exactly 21 words (9 targets, 3 critical lures, 9 unrelated). The PsychoPy experiment flow must include study, distractor, and test routines.
